sglang.title: feat: allow streaming for multi-prompt and/or parallel sampling
sglang.author: vhain
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Official OpenAI API and vLLM supports stream: true with parallel sampling (n > 1), and multi-prompt completions (len(prompt) > 1). However current version of SGLang does not support this.
The goal here is to support requests with stream: true AND (n > 1 OR len(prompt) > 1).
Modification
T

sglang.title: [Feature] add disable-custom-all-reduce
sglang.author: Xu-Chen
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Sometimes, we need to turn off Custom allreduce.
Especially on A800 with tp, to avoid timeout problems caused by NCCL communication.
Error like：vllm-project/vllm#6614
This may be the reason, not sure, but after setting disable-custom-all-reduce, the problem no longer occurs.
Modification

vllm.title: [Kernel] (1/N) Machete - Hopper Optimized Mixed Precision Linear Kernel
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Description
This PR introduces a spiritual successor to the Marlin kernel but optimized for Hopper architectures and based off of cutlass. This PR just adds the kernel implementation, unit tests and benchmarking scripts. End2end integration will come in a future PR.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Pin OpenTelemetry versions and make availability errors clearer
vllm.author: ronensc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR pins the major and minor versions of the OpenTelemetry packages to avoid potential issues with version mismatches.
Additionally, it enhances the clarity of OTel availability error messages.
These changes aim to mitigate issues like #7064, improving the stability and debuggability of the buil

vllm.title: [Misc] Add jinja2 as an explicit build requirement
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adding jinja2 was missed in the final 'review comments' commit of the Machete kernel (#7691, #7174 (comment)). jinja2 is used by csrc/quantization/machete/generate.py during the build.
It is not really an issue since torch is a build requirement and depends on jinja2 but still good to explicit here

vllm.title: [Core] Add `AttentionState` abstraction
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adds an AttentionState abstraction intended to hold attention backend-specific objects reused for the lifetime of the model runner. This allows us to remove all of the special casing for flashinfer in model runner.

vllm.title: [mypy] Enable following imports for entrypoints
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enables follow-imports=silent for vllm.entrypoints. It also cleans up some of the type annotations related to tokenizer (Union[PreTrainedTokenizer, PreTrainedTokenizerFast] is now replaced with AnyTokenizer).
Partially addresses #3680.
